SERVICE

Eyebrow
Transplant

Restore your confidence with full eyebrows. A permanent solution for thin or missing eyebrows.

Price from 69,900 CZK all-inclusive
Free consultation See pricing

PROBLEM

Why eyebrow transplant?

Full eyebrows are trending. A permanent solution for thin or uneven eyebrows.

Eyebrow thinning

The most common cause of eyebrow thinning is genetic predisposition, over-plucking, or medical conditions that lead to sparse or missing eyebrow hair.

Causes of thinning

Eyebrow thinning can result from genetics, hormonal changes, scarring, or excessive grooming. Transplantation is effective in all these cases.

PLACEHOLDER: Eyebrow thinning illustration

Visual representation of eyebrow thinning stages

Psychological impact

Loss of self-confidence, anxiety, dissatisfaction. Thin or missing eyebrows affect appearance, relationships and personal well-being.

SOLUTION

How it works

Eyebrow transplantation works similarly to hair transplantation, but with emphasis on natural growth direction.

Extraction from head

Grafts are extracted from the donor area of the head (occipital region). Hair from the head is ideal for eyebrow transplantation.

🌱

Implantation into face

Grafts are implanted into the face following the natural growth direction of the eyebrows. Each hair is placed precisely.

✨

Natural growth direction

Each hair is implanted following the correct growth direction of the eyebrows. The result looks completely natural.

CANDIDATES

Who is the transplant suitable for?

Ideal candidates for eyebrow transplantation.

25+

Age

The ideal age for eyebrow transplantation is 25 and above, when eyebrow growth is already stabilized.

✓

Stabilized growth

Eyebrow growth should already be stabilized. If the eyebrows are still developing, we will wait until stabilization.

💪

Sufficient donor area

There must be sufficient hair in the occipital area of the head for graft extraction. Full eyebrows require approximately 200-400 grafts per brow.

METHODS

Transplant methods

We use the most modern DHI and Sapphire FUE methods. Precision is crucial for eyebrows.

DHI

DHI method

Most precise method – direct implantation without channels using the Choi implanter pen.

  • Higher density
  • Shorter healing
  • Suitable for fine hair
Learn more about DHI →
Sapphire FUE

Sapphire FUE

Gentle method – sapphire blades instead of steel for less trauma.

  • Less skin trauma
  • Faster healing
  • Suitable for large areas
Learn more about Sapphire FUE →

PROCESS

How does the transplant work?

The process from consultation to result.

1

Consultation

Free consultation online or in person. We will evaluate your situation and propose a plan.

2

Preparation

We will arrange flights, hotel, transport. We will provide instructions for preparation.

3

Surgery

The procedure takes 6-8 hours under local anesthesia. Extraction and implantation of grafts.

4

Healing

First weeks of healing. We provide detailed instructions and follow-up care.

5

Growth

New hair starts growing after 3-4 months. Full result after 12-18 months.

FAQ

Frequently asked questions about eyebrow transplant

The procedure is performed under local anesthesia, so you feel no pain during surgery. After the procedure, there may be mild discomfort that usually subsides within a few days.

The procedure usually takes 6-8 hours depending on the number of grafts. The entire stay in Istanbul is 3 nights – the day before surgery, surgery day, and the day after surgery.

New hair starts growing after 3-4 months. The full result is visible after 12-18 months. During this time, we provide follow-up care and consultations.

Yes, eyebrow transplantation is possible even with very thin or almost no eyebrows. The important thing is to have a sufficient donor area on the head for graft extraction.

For eyebrow transplantation, it is not necessary to shave the head. Grafts are extracted from the occipital area (which may be shaved), but the face remains unshaved.
